cinematic.cardDisabledHint: When off, the generation request is not overridden

descriptions.camera.auto: No camera specified. Let the model decide based on the scene.
descriptions.camera.arri-alexa-35: Modern digital cinema look with high dynamic range, stable skin tones and highlights.
descriptions.camera.arri-alexa-65: Large-format cinema feel with a wider sense of space and stronger subject-background separation.
descriptions.camera.sony-venice-2: Full-frame digital cinema look with smooth highlight rolloff, ideal for realistic scenes.
descriptions.camera.red-v-raptor: Sharp, high-resolution digital imagery with crisp detail and edge definition.
descriptions.camera.imax-65mm: Emphasizes grand scale and fine detail, suited for epic, architectural, and large landscape shots.
descriptions.camera.bolex-16mm: 16mm film handheld feel with pronounced grain and a documentary quality.
descriptions.camera.film-35mm: 35mm film texture with noticeable grain, color rendition, and analog highlight character.
descriptions.camera.mirrorless: Modern mirrorless camera look — clean, lightweight, with a natural digital feel.
descriptions.camera.dslr: DSLR hybrid video/photo look with natural contrast and clear detail.
descriptions.camera.smartphone: Computational photography look — sharp, deep depth of field, and an everyday casual feel.
descriptions.camera.drone: Aerial drone perspective emphasizing high vantage points, open space, and stable movement.
descriptions.camera.action-camera: Action camera look with ultra-wide angle and dynamic energy, suited for POV or outdoor scenes.
descriptions.camera.camcorder: Handheld camcorder / documentary feel — direct, unpolished, and lifelike.
descriptions.camera.gimbal-rig: Gimbal-stabilized look with smooth motion, ideal for tracking and moving shots.
descriptions.palette.auto: No palette specified. Let the model use its default color decisions.
descriptions.palette.natural-clean: Natural, clean colors with restrained saturation and contrast.
descriptions.palette.warm-film: Warm film tones with soft highlights and a nostalgic overall feel.
descriptions.palette.bleach-bypass: Low saturation, high contrast — a colder, harder look.
descriptions.palette.neon-noir: Neon night style with deep shadows and vivid saturated colored light.
descriptions.palette.teal-orange: Teal-and-orange color grade with strong warm-cool contrast and a commercial cinema feel.
descriptions.palette.pastel-air: Low-contrast soft pastels for a light, airy atmosphere.
descriptions.palette.monochrome: Black-and-white image style, relying on tone and form for emotional expression.
descriptions.palette.muted-earth: Desaturated earth tones suited for nature, vintage, outdoor, or lifestyle scenes.
descriptions.palette.cyberpunk: High-saturation cyberpunk palette with magentas, cyans, and neon night lighting.
descriptions.palette.cross-process: Cross-processed film look with pronounced color shifts and strong stylization.
descriptions.lighting.auto: No lighting specified. Let the model handle it based on the scene.
descriptions.lighting.soft-window: Soft window light with natural shadow transitions, ideal for portraits and realistic interiors.
descriptions.lighting.overhead-fall: Overhead source with downward falloff for a more dramatic atmosphere.
descriptions.lighting.contre-jour: Strong backlight and rim light — brighter subject edges with layered background depth.
descriptions.lighting.low-key: Low-key lighting with large shadow areas, suited for suspense, moody, or premium-feeling shots.
descriptions.lighting.golden-hour: Warm golden-hour light with low-angle sun and pronounced long shadows.
descriptions.lighting.practical-lamps: Emphasizes visible practical light sources within the scene for a grounded, lifelike feel.
descriptions.lighting.volumetric-rays: Visible light beams and atmospheric haze with layered depth.
descriptions.lighting.neon-edge: Colored neon rim lighting that outlines and emphasizes the subject.
descriptions.lighting.moonlight-blue: Cool blue moonlight atmosphere, suited for night scenes and quiet moods.
descriptions.lighting.harsh-flash: Direct harsh flash with sharp shadows — raw and immediate.
descriptions.lens.auto: No lens specified. Let the model handle it based on the composition.
descriptions.lens.zeiss-master-prime: High-resolution, low-flare, clean and sharp cinema lens rendering.
descriptions.lens.cooke-s4: Warm, soft Cooke-style rendering with rounded skin tones and highlights.
descriptions.lens.panavision-c-series: Classic anamorphic lens character with oval bokeh and a strong cinematic feel.
descriptions.lens.anamorphic: Anamorphic widescreen look with horizontal lens flares and cinematic bokeh.
descriptions.lens.macro: Macro detail with shallow depth of field, ideal for products, textures, and close-up details.
descriptions.lens.vintage-haze: Vintage lens haze with diffused highlights and a softer overall image.
descriptions.lens.canon-k35: Retro cinema lens with warm tones and gentle contrast, adding a period feel to characters.
descriptions.lens.leica-summilux-c: Premium cinema lens quality — sharp yet not harsh, with smooth bokeh.
descriptions.lens.helios-44: Retro swirly bokeh effect with a stylized, rotating background blur.
descriptions.lens.fisheye: Fisheye ultra-wide distortion for exaggerated perspective, suited for special viewpoints.
descriptions.lens.telephoto-zoom: Telephoto compression that isolates the subject and brings the background closer.
descriptions.focalLength.auto: No focal length specified. Let the model choose based on the scene.
descriptions.focalLength.12mm: Ultra-wide perspective with exaggerated space, suited for grand scenes and close-range impact.
descriptions.focalLength.24mm: Wide-angle cinematic perspective with rich environmental context, ideal for establishing scenes.
descriptions.focalLength.35mm: Natural narrative perspective with a balanced ratio of environment to subject.
descriptions.focalLength.50mm: Standard portrait perspective — natural subject rendering with minimal distortion.
descriptions.focalLength.75mm: Medium telephoto compression that isolates the subject with a softer background.
descriptions.focalLength.100mm: Stronger telephoto compression, suited for distance shots, details, and quiet observation.
descriptions.aperture.auto: No aperture or depth of field specified.
descriptions.aperture.f1.2: Extremely shallow depth of field with heavy background blur and maximum subject isolation.
descriptions.aperture.f1.4: Noticeably shallow depth of field, ideal for portraits, night scenes, and soft bokeh.
descriptions.aperture.f2: Shallow depth of field while retaining some environmental context.
descriptions.aperture.f2.8: Common cinema shallow depth of field — sharp subject with moderately blurred background.
descriptions.aperture.f4: Medium depth of field with both subject and partial background in focus.
descriptions.aperture.f5.6: Balanced depth of field with more complete environmental detail.
descriptions.aperture.f8: Deep depth of field — both foreground and background are clearly rendered.
descriptions.aperture.f11: Deeper depth of field, suited for environments, architecture, and group shots.
descriptions.aperture.f16: Very deep depth of field with overall sharpness across the image.
descriptions.aperture.f22: Maximum deep focus — both foreground and background rendered as sharp as possible.
descriptions.movement.auto: No movement specified. Let the model handle it based on the video content.
descriptions.movement.locked-off: Fixed camera with a stable frame, suited for observation and compositional display.
descriptions.movement.slow-dolly: Slow dolly in or out, enhancing spatial layers and emotional progression.
descriptions.movement.steadicam: Smooth Steadicam tracking, ideal for walking subjects and continuous motion.
descriptions.movement.handheld: Slight handheld shake for a stronger documentary and on-location feel.
descriptions.movement.orbit: Orbital movement around the subject, emphasizing spatial depth and subject contour.
descriptions.movement.crane: Crane shot for revealing scene scale or creating a sense of grandeur.
descriptions.effect.film-grain: Adds fine film grain for an analog texture.
descriptions.effect.halation: Warm halo glow around highlights, enhancing the film look.
descriptions.effect.bloom: Softened, diffused highlights for a dreamy, gentle atmosphere.
descriptions.effect.vignette: Slight darkening at the edges to draw attention toward the center.
descriptions.effect.chromatic-aberration: Subtle color fringing at the edges, adding lens imperfection and stylistic texture.
descriptions.effect.motion-blur: Directional motion blur to reinforce speed and movement.
descriptions.effect.lens-flare: Realistic lens flare, suited for strong side light and backlit scenes.
descriptions.effect.anamorphic-widescreen: 2.39:1 widescreen feel with pronounced horizontal flares and anamorphic character.

audio.desktopHint: Drag assets here to insert @mediaN | Reference media enabled per model capability
audio.emptyHelpWithLimit: Drag in assets from the right panel or upload audio / video / image references
audio.emptyHelpNoLimit: The current model does not support reference media
audio.stylePromptPlaceholderVoiceClone: e.g. calm narration, ad voiceover, casual read
audio.voiceUnavailableForMode: This voice is not available for the current mode
audio.cloneReferenceProvided: Reference audio provided by the voice library
audio.sourceAudioUnavailable: Source audio cannot be previewed or is missing
audio.voiceProfileDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief note, e.g. young male, natural narration
audio.cloneConsentText: I confirm I have the right to use this reference audio and authorize it for voice cloning.
audio.promptPlaceholderWithText: Enter text to read, generate music, or create sound effects... Type @ to reference works
audio.promptPlaceholderWithoutText: Text is optional; upload or drag in the required reference media, then run
audio.validationEmptyName: Please enter a voice name first
audio.validationCloneNeedsAudio: Cloning a voice requires at least one audio reference
audio.validationCloneNeedsConsent: Please confirm reference audio authorization before saving a cloned voice
audio.validationDesignNeedsPrompt: Designing a voice requires a voice description

imageGeneration.desktopHint: Drag assets here to insert @mediaN | Drop below as reference only
imageGeneration.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to create... Type @ to reference works
imageGeneration.negativePromptPlaceholder: Elements you do not want, for example blurred, text
imageGeneration.customSizePlaceholder: e.g. 2560x1440, width and height must be multiples of 16
imageGeneration.customSizeHint: Constraints: max side ≤ 3840px, width and height must be multiples of 16, aspect ratio determined by size and ≤ 3:1, total pixels 655,360-8,294,400.
imageGeneration.referenceHelpSupported: Supports JPG / PNG / WEBP | up to {limit} images | drag assets from the right panel or paste from clipboard
imageGeneration.referenceHelpUnsupported: The current model does not support reference images
imageGeneration.referenceEmptyUnsupported: The current model does not support reference images

videoGeneration.desktopHint: Drag assets here to insert @mediaN | Drop below as reference only

disabledHint.audioReference: Add the required reference audio or select a cloned voice

errors.downloadNoImage: The image download API did not return an image

mask.hint: Paint to mark areas for redraw

compare.label: Compare

outpaint.label: Outpaint
outpaint.hint: Set the pixel expansion on each side

redraw.title: Redraw
redraw.hint: Paint a mask and describe the new content to replace it with
redraw.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Replace the cup with a glass vase, keep the original lighting

erase.title: Erase
erase.hint: Paint the area to remove; the system will fill in the background

outpaint.title: Outpaint
outpaint.hint: Set expansion margins and describe the extended direction
outpaint.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Extend the kitchen counter and natural window light to the right

cutout.title: Cutout
cutout.hint: Remove the background and keep the subject

angle.title: Angle
angle.hint: Adjust the viewing angle via angle controls
angle.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Switch to a low-angle mid-shot, keep the subject consistent

lighting.title: Relight
lighting.hint: Adjust the lighting via light controls
lighting.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Add a warm key light from the front-left

visualAdjust.errorMessageImageNotLoaded: The image has not finished loading yet.
visualAdjust.errorMessageApplyFailed: Visual adjustment failed. Please check the image and try again.
visualAdjust.dragAngleAriaLabel: Drag the control to adjust the angle
visualAdjust.dragLightingAriaLabel: Drag the light source to adjust the lighting
